mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, payload) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{payload})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET read_flag = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE notification SET read_flag = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_flag = FALSE
